reviews.review_text: Every time I stay with BIG 4 I am always very satisfied by the standard of the villa, the fit out and furnishings. This location is a comfortable walking distance to downtown Launceston as well as supermarkets and cafes.

Will accept late-night arrivals, and payment can be arranged the next day. The washroom complex is massive, with around 8 separate showers and 5 separate toilets in the male section. The hot water showers had impressively strong pressure.
There are plenty of powered parking slots available. The powered site was around $55 per night, which was one of the cheapest options in Tasmania while still including all facilities.
The kitchen facility is a bit small, but it includes everything you need.
Awesome park situated close to the centre of town. Very clean facilities and well looked after park. Definitely the place to stay!
Easy to find. Very clean. Good location. Quiet. Very pleased with my stay.

Very welcoming staff on arrival. We had a powered site for our motorhome, which was easy to access. Facilities are very good....nice hot showers!

Park is reasonably located to Cataract Gorge and Launceston CBD.  We walked alot, and also used uber.

Overall, had a really nice stay!
Clean and easy to get to. Reception staff were helpful and welcoming. Toilets are brightly lit and clean.

Firstly, the staff were extremely friendly and it was a great and easy check-in process.

Has a little park and jumping pillow for the kids, which was great.

The cabins were nice and modern.
There were wallabies and wildlife at night time, which was great for the kids to spot and keep them entertained

The view was lovely of Launceston however it can be quite noisy due to just off the freeway and you can hear the trucks of a night.

The camp kitchen is due for a much needed upgrade.

Overall had a great day
Great spot overlooking Launceston.
Great spot, close to everything in Launceston.  Lovely staff who were happy to help in anyway.

Great little park. We stayed in a powered site for 4 nights in April 2026. Staff were nice, check in process easy. They are building a new camp kitchen which is definitely needed. Be aware the park is next to the freeway and was quite noisy because of this. Asking for a site further away from the freeway end would help with noise. We loved that we could use our raised fire pit. They have lots of new fancy cabins and villas built up the hill side. Lots of evening wildlife to spot as well.

Absolutely highly recommend to anyone, the customer service is second to none, the cabins are amazing. The team went over and above for us in a very stressful time. Will never stay anywhere else in Launceston after the way they looked after us.
Great park, great staff fantastic location.

Staff were very nice and helpful
Showers were the best I have had with heaps of water pressure and steady heat
All facilities were very clean

We had a wonderful experience at Big4 Launceston Holiday Park! The place is amazing! It is very accessible to everything you need, making it easy to get around and enjoy the area. The staff were friendly, helpful, and made the stay feel personal. It’s honestly a home away from home — warm, comfortable, and relaxing.

We stayed in one of the Tamar Villa's which are opposite the jumping pillow and the reason we booked this villa.
The first night we had a terrible sleep as the Queen bed is rock hard. The bunk beds are soft so our daughter slept well. We got extra blankets for the second night to add more padding to the Queen bed which made it sleepable and my wife slept in the spare bunk bed. They really need to add a matress topper to the Queen beds.
Other wise we had no issues with the accommodation and would stay again if the bed situation improved.
There is a two ring cooktop and if you needed to use an oven there is one in the old camp kitchen which is nearby. They are currently in the process of building a new camp kitchen.
The office staff we dealt with were very friendly and helpful.
The park is close to the main road but we didn't find it too noisy.
It was very good and close to city. Toilets and showers area is also very clean.

We had a wonderful stay at the Big4 Launceston. Our room was so clean, bright and exactly as advertised. We were very comfortable, warm and had enough space. The bouncy pillow was a great for the kids to unwind at the end of a day exploring Launceston. There was a lot of activities in walking distance. All the staff were excellent and we appreciated the handouts of places to go and where to eat on arrival. We would definitely stay here again.

Nice enough park so far ish .
Will be better when its finished.
Terrible location.
The noise from the highway is incredible  !  All day and night .
If you want a quiet and peaceful park ...this isn't it !
We will move in as soon as possible .
Staff is friendly. Very neat and tidy place. Amenities are maintained well. Close to everything. We really enjoyed our stay here.
Parked up our motorhome for a few nights. Excellent place to stay. Exceptional service!! Bathrooms as neat and clean as. Highly recommend!!
Convenient location and clean environment

This caravan park is very easy to access, just off the highway leading in to Launceston. This has a downside though, it is incredibly noisy due to trucks using their exhaust breaks going downhill right next to it.

The play area is inconveniently placed, in that it can't be seen from most of the accommodation.
As of our visit, the camp kitchen is not usable.

Staff are nice.

There are some good views to be had but sometimes it means skirting the edge of peoples camp-sites in order to see them (so not really accessible to most people).

Edit: Expanded comment, not everything I had planned to say made it in the first time.

WOW just WOW!!!

This place goes up there with the nicest places we have stayed,

Whilst the grounds look like a typical Tassie regional park and not much to it, the accommodation is simply breathtaking so much so you will never want to leave!

Staff amazing and the place was spotlessly clean, the housekeeping team have done and amazing job

Highly recommend!!!

Large campsite that appears recently renovated, with fairly new, clean bathrooms (though other guests don’t always keep them clean - not flushing toilets).

The camp kitchen is tiny and basic—one of the least equipped I’ve seen on the Great Ocean Road and in Tasmania. The layout is inconvenient, with the camp kitchen at corner and BBQ at opposite end, making cooking stressful. There’s no cleaning equipment provided, and the BBQ/seating area is right next to the bins.

The site located right next to the highway is dirt and gravel (we had a powered site), with a huge laundry facilities. The WiFi is unreliable like all I have stayed at.  Overall the stay was uncomfortable due to the kitchen site setup.

We booked an accessible unit for 2 nights. Our party of 3 had 2 mobility challenged guests. I am the mobile person. Both of my other guests greatly enjoyed the accessibility of our unit. The unit was also new or near new. We could nearly not fault this unit and it was the best unit and best Big 4 we stayed in during our 3 week road trip. The location was excellent and very close to all the places we wanted to visit as well as supermarket, petrol station and liquor outlet.  The only very minor quibble we had and it is very minor is that the fridge door opened the wrong way. We believe these doors can be changed to open the other way and suggest they be re-configured to do so. Otherwise the quality of this park & unit was exceptional.

The park is located alongside a busy freeway so it was a bit noisy at night. The camp kitchen was under construction and we werent able to use it- there was only a sink. The staff were really nice though.
The acomatation very comfortable.
Booked a powered camp-site. A bit pricey but it was well located, amenities were clean and had all we needed for our quick over night stay.
Immaculate Park, stayed on a powered site. Close to the CBD. Enjoyed our stay.
Great location especially with kids. Great place for a budget stay with play equipment and jumping pillow at the accommodation. Our cabin was clean and warm. Beds were comfy. Highly recommend!
Excellent accommodation. Just what we needed. All so new, clean and comfortable.

This caravan park is a short distance from Cataract Gorge and close to the town centre. Conveniently located for the airport too. A motorway is very close by so it's not the quietest caravan park in Tasmania.
Check in and out process was very easy.
Had a site for a motorhome for one night. Amenities were great. Lovely reception area and friendly greeting thank you. No issues. Great stay.

A spacious and well laid out park.
Plenty of showers and toilets, all very clean.
A new camp kitchen is being built, but the current one is fine so no need to delay.
Staff are very informative and happy!
Easy walk to Launceston town centre. A mainly flat walk to the chairlift via town and the gorge, or take a more challenging walk directly to the gorge.

We had  RV to stay in. The park was better than I imagined.  Great amenities , has a dump point and water is?available to top up. Kids playing area is good. Kangaroos wallabies were around especially at night.
We had a caravan site which was nice and level. Staff are excellent and all the facilities are very clean and modern. Would certainly recommend this park.
廚房非常小僅，夠ㄧ個人使用
Clean and tidy park and amenities. Very noisy due to the proximity to a main road.

We stayed on a campsite.  The staff were helpful and friendly.  The park grounds and amenities were lovely.  Except the camp kitchen was inadequate and is currently being upgraded.  The other issue the rubbish disposal bins were quite a distance to the amenities and not evenly spread through the park just grouped together.
The park is adjacent to the freeway and quite noisy.  Other than that the park is in walking distance to the food venues and shops.

Very comfortable well appointed,  the layout is a bit like a bedsit with kitchen lounge and main bed in an open plan layout, with twp bunk beds strategically fitted into a nook by the front door. A great view from your front deck where a small table and chairs allow you to sit and enjoy a vino available from the shop within the main office along with other locally produced items and souvenirs.
From the deck overlooking the surrounding hills you can watch the passing parade of cars and trucks and
although not far from the main Hwy all windows are double glazed so you can rely on a peaceful nights sleep .

We booked a city villa, it was spacious, modern and clean. Had a large kitchen space and full size fridge. Couch was comfy and we didn't have any road noise. Was nice to open the door in the morning to see a couple of wallabies too. The Phlynns

On a major highway and directly under the flight path to Launceston airport (still operating cargo jets between 2 & 3am) this is the noisiest campsite we’ve ever mistakenly booked. We would have got the same amount of sleep tenting on the median strip of the adjacent highway. Camp kitchen is a dirty afterthought with just one sink with the wrong plug so it is impossible to fill with water.
Was very clean and modern holiday cabin, service was great
Nice cabin stay good for family.

Does the job if you need to camp in Launy! Nice vibe, good wildlife with lots of pademelons, clean amenities.

Downside was a very small camp kitchen suitable for one person cooking at a time. Did not have nearly the facilities of other big 4s in Aus / Tasmania and remains at a high price which we feel should be lower given the above.
Great carvan park, close to town and a great base to explore Launceston. Very clean amenities and friendly staff. Highly recommend this park.
Campervan stay. Great stay, friendly staff, clean amenities!
Great place close to town if you are a light sleeper get a unit up the back as you will here the freeway all night but we still had a good time units are great

Big4 Launceston Caravan Park is excellent. A big thanks to the reception staff for advice on local establishments for dinner and best way to walk. The period housing was great and the meals and venue better. The caravan bays are excellent with no crossfall. The ablutions are clean and new. Thankyou Big4 Launceston for a great start to our vacation.

If you are in a soft-sided camper trailer you need to know it is LOUD here. Proximity to the main road downhill into town means truck noise is constant and horrendous.
Secondly,  the website describes it as a 'landscaped park' which is a massive stretch. Sure, the cabins look delux but the powered site strips are utilitarian. Despite describing our camper trailer at booking, we were issued a sloping site.  It's very hard to level a 2 wheel trailer front to back! Our jockey wheel was overextended to try and raise the front so had to settle for heads-down sleeping.
This is a very basic campground. The showers are hot but of course they should be for $70 per night.  If you are spending any time in Launceston with a camper trailer, recommend you stay elsewhere.

Énorme bungalow, hyper bien aménagé et vraiment super propre, on se sent tout de suite à l’aise. Tout est pratique pour une famille, avec de l’espace, du confort et un équipement au top. Gros plus : c’est aux portes de la ville, donc idéal pour visiter Launceston sans galérer, tout en restant au calme. On recommande à 100% !

Great stay at BIG4 Launceston Holiday Park. Clean, well-maintained park with spacious sites and modern amenities. The staff were friendly and welcoming, and the kids loved the playground and jumping pillow. Easy access to Launceston and a great base for exploring the area. Would definitely stay again.
Very expensive, was told on booking that they were sold out, when I arrived to book another couple came in looking for a site and got one and there were empty sites that night.
Very clean and tidy location and the best showers in a caravan park i have used fantastic place
Very tidy and accommodating! Excellent help from staff with any and all issues! Bathrooms were exceptionally clean, I highly recommend!

Easy to book and quick check in. Convenient location so close to the city. Quiet and very clean. The showers were great and bathroom was clean. Nearby food trucks were in walking distance which meant we didn’t have to drive out and find food.

We had some van problems and needed somewhere to store our van and grab a cabin while we sorted things out and continue our trip. The team at Big 4 Launceston were so helpful and accommodating. Can’t recommend more highly. Thanks for everything.
Best amenities block I’ve ever used. The entire park is clean and the campsites are spacious. All facilities are in very good working order.

My daughter and I travelled from Townsville to Launceston for a 3 week holiday and spent nearly the first week staying in a two bedroom villa at the park.
Our villa was very modern,  very clean and had everything that we could have wanted.
I thought that the proximity of the highway might have caused a problem but you could not hear it once you are inside .
Very central location which made it easy to find from the airport and close to everything that we wanted to visit.
Could not recommend it more highly as it was perfect for our needs.
Thank you for assisting in making our Tassie adventure very enjoyable.

Stayed in one of the condos for one night on our way to Devonport at the end of our trip. King size bed with en suite, double bed, and 4 bunk beds, so could accommodate up to 8 people. It was a fantastic way to relax after a couple of weeks of travelling around Tasmania. Modern, clean, comfortable accommodation with everything you could want. Televisions in living space, and 2 main bedrooms, so you can stream different services if you wish. Spacious bathrooms, including large showers with big shower heads that had good pressure. Modern oven that heated quickly, dishwasher that actually cleaned the plates, with dishwashing powder and liquid provided for cleaning up after meals. Large fridge freezer. Large balcony overlooking the Big 4 site below. Jumping pillow to keep the children entertained. Close to the freeway and Cataract Gorge. Wallabies and Pademelons moving around the site at night and early in the morning. Really enjoyed our one night stay, would highly recommend.

Very conveniently located; walking distance to the city,
great showers and clean amenities

Be very wary of booking online for this one, read the policy on their website before booking cause if you don't then you will be charged your full price if you cancel within 30 days of arrival and offered no refund only a park credit.
Yes I know it's my fault for not reading them but honestly who will until you need to cancel.
Hugely overpriced, $63 ( powered caravan site ) for first night but then it went to $84 for the next nights, got told it was the rates for this time of year as school holidays but yeah that's ridiculous.
Will never go there at all, better to book out of town and save your money as even with the added fuel costs you will still come out in front.
Hugely disappointed and we didn't even stay there.
PS, just got a reply from the park and he thought my last sentence was like reviewing a restaurant without dinning there, well yes I would give a negative review if they charged me for a meal if I cancelled my booking and I certainly wasn't risking another $85 for a site that was barely going to fit my 13ft caravan on, better to cut my losses and stay somewhere esle.

The Team have done a fantastic job providing a quality accommodation option for travellers here. Located close to town, with great accommodation options from campsites to self-contained cabins, while still changes are being made to the site this was a very pleasant stay for us travelling in 2x family groups. The only issue was the closeness to the freeway, which wasn't significant, but did generate some background noise. Otherwise fantastic!
Wonderful to arrive and be so welcomed by all staff. Lovely facilities and great times for the children

Firstly the staff are lovely and this review is not a reflection on them. They are all doing their job well and are friendly and helpful.

We left after one night and after discussing the below issues the owners refunded the second night which was much appreciated.

The positives:
- Close to town
- Large, light filled and clean toilets and showers
- Fun jump pad for kids
- Large laundry with plenty of machines

The negatives:
- The complete lack of an appropriate camp kitchen: it’s not enclosed, has one each of a tiny stove, tiny microwave and small kettle.
- Only 2 picnic tables / eating areas
- The laundry is only coin operated: not many people carry cash these days! And after hours it becomes impossible to change any money
- The price is extremely high for a powered site

This place caters for cabin users. You will note that ALL the glowing reviews are from people who booked cabins. If that is what you’re booking you’ll have no complaints as you’ll have a kitchenette, space to eat both inside and outside your cabin etc.

However a Big4 site needs to cater to campers as a primary focus rather than as an afterthought. The map notes ‘A new camp kitchen is being built’. Until it is, the price for sites (not cabins) should be halved.

Stayed in a three bedroom condo for 2 nights, the room was clean and comfortable, it had everything we needed for our stay except a washing machine. There is a laundry available to use in the park.
The view from our room was spectacular. Was even better at night with all the city lights. There are reviews mentioning the noise from the close proximity to the highway. It is noisy especially with the window open but it didn't keep us awake or wake us in the night so wasn't an issue.
For younger children there is a jumping pillow.
Staff were friendly and welcoming. Received a text when our room was ready which was good if we wanted to check in early.
A great base to do all the touristy activities. The cabin was modern, with all the facilities you could need. Friendly staff, clean and neat accommodation. Thank you for our stay
Awesome facilities, very clean, and staff super friendly and helpful 👍
It was a wonderful stay! So clean and new and well maintained! Great for families with little ones!
Everything is awesome here. The room is clean and immaculate. The amenities are well maintained and all things needed are there. Super welcoming stay.

Big 4 Cabins in Launceston  it was central to the city walking distance  clean we had a villa myself and husband had everything we needed  lovely shop great friendly staff you wont be disappointed! We will go back
Great location and great service, we love Big 4
Great camp site. Each site had generous space and the facilities were really clean. Good hot showers too. Would definitely stay again.
Clean with simple amenities. Free parking at site. Good enough for 7 pax.

We stayed two nights in the luxury condo and couldn't fault it or the service. Everything was thought of, spotlessly clean, and beautifully appointed. We loved the view over the city lights of an evening, with loads of space on the huge balcony to relax.
Modern and very well maintained houses. Five star facilities and perfect for big families! View was wonderful too!

We only stayed 1 night but from the moment we arrived we were greeted warmly. The park was very well kept. I really appreciated the Tasmanian products & gifts in the reception area. The location was great, close to everything we wanted to see the next day.
I'd definitely go back & stay again
Great central location. Friendly staff and great amenities.

We booked a site for our tent over the website. Upon arriving the ladies at the front desk were laughing at our booking as unbeknownst to us the park was totally unsuitable to tent users. The ground on all the sites are far too firm to pitch a tent and was situated in a very windy and exposed area which meant that we were unable to pitch a tent. The staff were extremely unhelpful and laughed in our faces about our situation. Eventually we had to park down the hill in a more sheltered environment away from our campsite. For the price we paid for this location, it was completely incomparable to the service we received. Overall very disappointed and will not be returning.

Very disappointing sites. The sites were advertised as tent sites, but we're not at all suitable due to dry ground and wind. On arrival the receptionists laughed at us when we said we were using a tent and refused to help us. We ended up pitching the tent down the hill, not on a site, as that was the only possible spot. Bathroom facilities were dirty. Camp kitchen was under construction with no alternatives. Location is next to main roads and not pleasant. Very overpriced for what you get.
A great park

We received notification early that our cabin was ready and we could arrive.

The 2 bedroom cabin on the hill was lovely.
Walking distance to city, close to cataract gorge and places to eat. Short drive to airport.

Cabin was very clean and looked new.  A nice welcoming hand written note awaited us.

Would certainly stay here again.
Amazing staff and service. Great location right next to beach. One of the best camp kitchens and shower facilities.
Very nice place to stay. Cabin was comfy, and spacious. Staff were friendly and very helpful. Would happily stay there again.
Nice van park close to the city but also nice and quiet. All amenities available and very clean and modern.
Great park and close to everything Launceston has to offer.
Very neat and tidy caravan park will be even more better once they're renovations to camp kitchen is complete

The accommodation was excellent with everything you needed.
Staff were friendly and helpful.
Will definitely stay there again

Central Park close to the City by car but you could easily walk if you wanted to. Camp is very clean and well set up. They are doing some extensions of the size of camp. It has a small store to buy the essentials.  They have cabins or small units they let out.

Great location and very clean.
Great comfortable bed.
Only thing would recommend is a airier to dry your washing .
Great stay. Shame about someone burning off next door

Firstly the best part about this camp is that the reception makes it look good. $54 with a Big 4 discount for me, my tiny tent and bicycle! No other camping option in town.  I had to climb a steep hill out of the town centre to get to it. Was told by reception the ground is too hard to put my tent pegs in. Going through renovations apparently. No enclosed camp kitchen it was freezing. Incredibly noisy next freeway. Toilets near camp kitchen atrocious. Pure price gouging!

Lovely, friendly & helpful staff
Sorry, rooms didn't apply to us as we had purchased own van

Booked a camping site over the phone with Trudy who was very helpful. Booked in with Colleen when we arrived and she gave me some recommendations for good local restaurants as it was my birthday. Saw the ladies again when getting a souvenir from the gift shop on site (all locally made) and they wrapped it up all lovely for me. The park is in a good location for site seeing and dining, showers were hot and amenities were clean. Kids liked the jumping pillow

Excellent site for wandering around Launceston.   Really good van facilities, easy access to everything, if you want to explore the north of Tas.  great for families with an awesome playground for the kids.    Have stayed here a couple of times, once in the cabins and also with our caravan.  would highly recommend
Great location and nice caravan park. Good level site, very clean and spacious amenities. Lack of decent camp kitchen but one is getting built.

This park was beautiful along with lovely views as our villa was situated high up on the hill.
The villa was very very clean and the staff were exceptionally friendly.
Thank you for a fabulous stay!!

Stayed here for three nights in a City Villa. The lady who greeted us at check in was very friendly and helpful. The villa was lovely and clean and had everything we required. The bed was very comfortable. Good location despite being close to a very busy road. Well kept grounds and amenities. Would definitely stay here again.
Lovely presented park. Close to city. Amenities clean and tidy. Very welcoming.

We stayed at Big 4 Launceston Holiday Park recently while travelling around Tasmania.  This would have to be one of the best Big 4 Parks we have ever stayed at.  Right from arrival, the staff were so welcoming and friendly.  The lady at the front desk suggested, for a small fee we could upgrade to one of the Hilltop Cabins.  We took her up on her offer and were so glad we did.  The Hilltop cabins are amazing.  Very modern, high standard, very clean and well maintained, not to mention the view. The kitchen was well equipped, along with the rest of the Cabin. If anyone is travelling around Tasmania, this Big 4 Park is by far the best one and a must visit.
Thank you to everyone at Big 4 Launceston Holiday Park for making our two nights stay a very memorable experience.  We will definitely be staying at your park again, on our next trip.

I just spent time in my home state with my elderly parents and my sister.  We stayed in 2 bedroom cabin for two nights and the 3 bedroom cabin 1 night.  Both cabins are clean, spacious, have everything you need.
Two bed has queen bed and 2nd room 2 singles and 1 bunk.  Great mattress and pillows.
3 bed has master with ensuite, 2nd queen bed and 3rd  2 sets of bunks.  I believe both cabins pretty new.  The kitchens have everything covered.  Only suggestions I would make are,
1. For elderly or disabled  showers with hand rails, ( the bathrooms have plenty of room for disabled).
2. Full length mirror, great for getting ready for special event or night out.
3. Pillows are very high.
This is certainly not a criticism, just constructive feedback,  to cater for wide customer base.

The traffic noise is there, but is minimised by the windows being closed at the front.  Really not a lot you can do when your in a valley.  It does ease up at night, didn't distract from our live of our stay.

Thank you for our wonderful stay, you really made our trip ' home' memorable and your customer service was so friendly and helpful.
Hope your business thrives.

Really enjoyed our stay here, thankyou.
We had a really beautiful clean cabin with a bathroom and kitchenette, perfect for us travelling with a baby. They had a baby bundle available which included cot, linen, highchair and bath which took the all hassle away in finding this elsewhere. All the staff were lovely and friendly 😀 Thanks so much.

The Cabins are first class, clean, fresh and modern. The only negative is the location opposite the freeway which can be noisy from time to time in the middle of the night from trucks using their engine brakes down the hill. Ideally the Tasmanian Government should be installing sound proof barriers next to the freeway like they do in Victoria at locations like this.
Fabulous studio villa and bigger than expected. Well equipped kitchen, spotlessly clean and very quiet location.
Great place. First class. Very highly recommend.
Great view and place to be based to see Launceston.  Staff are friendly and the amenities are great.

We hired a powered site for our campervan. The location was very central. It is quite close to a large road but we weren’t disturbed overnight by traffic noise.  Amenities were very clean and modern. The park grounds were very neatly maintained. We stayed one night and would recommend it to other travellers.
Great experience, great showers (no timer), easy check in, great location! Friendly facilities, will definitely come back! Thank you ☺️
Die Anlage liegt sehr nah am Highway, entsprechend laut ist es. Die Einrichtungen sind absolut sauber und in Ordnung. Ausreichend Toiletten und Duschen und jeweils 4 Waschmaschinen und Trockner
Stayed in the 2 bedroom cabin.  Was very clean and tidy and had everything needed.  Was close to lots of things.  Staff were really friendly and helpful.  Would recommend and stay again.

A big thank you to Jo, Ben and the others who helped with our issues. Your fast assistance was much appreciated. I know that was that an unexpected and not... small issue that was dealt with easily.

I greatly enjoyed my time in the park. It's conveniently located, easy to find and despite the proximity to the highway put you off. The traffic isn't as load as you think it is going to be.

We stayed 2 nights in the 2-bedroom cabin. The cabin was amazing, beds were comfortable. Not much to do at the Big 4 itself, but you're so close to amazing activities like the gorge chairlifts, and Penny Royal was amazing. We traveled from Melbourne, so we enjoyed our time traveling around Tasmania.
Kitchen facilities for campers is unclean and third world .  Avoid.
Amazing Park....everything top notch
Will be great if they ever finish the camp kitchen. Currently it’s too small, open to the elements and didn’t even have a plug for the sink

Due to the weather forecast we changed from a powered site to a Hilltop Cabin. The cabins are beautiful, with everything you need in the kitchen and bathroom. Very comfortable bed and couch. Unfortunately the bouncy pillow and kids playground was under renovation and for those camping the camp kitchen is open and so not an inviting place to hang out. If you want somewhere close to Launceston centre to stay, this is a great option.

We took our caravan, probably a little more than most caravan parks, amenity block was clean, it was with the little extra, didn't have to put money in the shower and run out of time with conditioner still in your hair, which has happened to me before. Overall lovely park, we have stayed there before and will continue to do so. Thank you staff

Nice location.
Facilities are clean.
Nice clean Park and awesome service
Lovely staff at check in and facilities are very clean, with good space between sites.

For us it a a second time stay there.
Very well positioned. Near the highway which is very convenient but a little noisy sometimes.
Reception was amazing and very friendly. We will be back for sure.
The perfect location to be able tonwalk into town. Quiet and spacious amount campers. Amenities are top grade.
Very nice and comfortable, great place to stay to start our short break in Tasmania

Fantastic!
This was an absolute surprise, the cabin was pre-heated for us, the towels were soft and the sheets were crisp and a hand written note wished us a pleasant stay. The cabin was spotlessly clean and very modern. I recommend this place to any family.
Location next to the highway was an adjustment but not a deal breaker because the cabins are quiet sound proof. Great 👏 thank you!

I was super happy with the place.  The staff were amazing and worked some serious magic to accommodate me for 17 days while I worked even when they had a huge booking.  Cabins were high standard and very clean I will always come back if I have down here again.  Great effort team

We had a powered caravan site,. The ladies at reception were very knowledgeable, and explained things to see.
The area around our site was very well kept, and the toilets and laundry were very clean.
Thank you.
Great location! Sites are good. Staff were lovely.

Only had a powered site
Staff very friendly

Stayed in the smallest cabin option. It is either recently built or recently refurbished, as are all the cabins - great modern feel. Clean & has everything you need. The staff were super friendly and helpful, which was lovely. There are amazing views over Launceston from higher parts of the park. And a beautiful gift shop in with reception for all your Tas made products.

We had a lovely time staying at the Big 4 Launceston site. It is perfectly located, the staff are very friendly, knowledgeable and accommodating. The cabin we stayed in was so very clean, it had everything we needed for our one week stay and I had excellent sleep, as the bed and room were just right (clean, new, comfortable, cosy, warm).
We will definitely stay again, when next visiting. Thank you.

Only a 2.6km walk into the town centre, we had a Hilltop villa Nd the views are amazing, everything is here, a new villa and all the incidentals you need. The only issue we had was the plastic topped beds but this was soon resolved by removing them and leaving the mattress topper. The staff here are great and the park is very comfortable.

Very clean and comfortable cabin! Kitchen is well equipped with the basics. Location is alright since we drive everywhere. Nice, quiet surroundings.
Definitely will come back again!
Jo was amazingly helpful and polite. Very happy with the whole stay. Good job.
Great spot to stay, near to the city and is a quiet area

Prefect location over looking Launceston, luxury condos are perfect have everything and more including good view. Staff at reception are very friendly and helpful. Highly recommended this big 4 park and would stay here again

My wife and I stayed at the BIG4 Launceston caravan park in early August.   We were allocated a cabin which had all the conveniences we needed for our stay.   We were impressed by the overall cleanliness of the cabin and of the surrounding area.  As we were visiting Launceston mainly for business we didn't get to explore the entire property but from what we observed this BIG4 was very well kept and ably run by a very helpful management team.
We have no hesitation in recommending this BIG4 to anyone wishing to stay in Launceston in comfortable, convenient accommodation.  10/10
Beautiful new cabins, fully equipped for your stay, very clean & short distance from city centre. Lovely welcoming reception.
Have stayed on site with our van on 2 occasions now and enjoyed the stay tremendously. Thank you for making us welcome

Great service, Jo looked after us really well. A friendly face aand great help with lots of local knowledge. Location was easy to get to and the cabin was modern and well appointed. Definitely will stay again when in Launceston . Thanks
Very clean spacious room with great customer service by the staff. Modern facilities.

Enjoyed our stay – very welcoming reception staff.
Very clean cabin and accommodating for our family stay. Toiletries, towels & bedding all provided.

I'm not much of a camera but I must say, this is a fantastic site. The facilities are great, catered for all out needs. MOST IMPORTANT the amenities were clean, fresh and free of spiderwebs!Definitely coming back!
Really great facilities and friendly staff. The shower was notable for how good it was. Lovely stay here

Highly recommend.
Absolutely beautiful rooms, brand new & spacious with stunning views of Launceston - by day & by night!
Very friendly staff, extremely helpful and accommodating to our needs, best shower too 🙂

Stayed for a night and is what I expected of a big 4. Facilities were clean and tidy with powered site. Had a jumping pillow and small play ground for the kids. Are doing upgrades which will enhance the stay. Only thing I can pick is no fire pit in winter would’ve made the night. Camp is minimal with limited utensils.
We where there for 1 week ,the staff where lovely and the cabin we had was the cleanest one we had ever hired ,it was also very modern .i will definitely be going back .Very happy

We recently stayed at this Big 4 caravan park with our family and found the property to be clean, comfortable, and well-maintained. Unfortunately, the electricity went out in our cabin on the first night due to a faulty power board. While this was inconvenient, we were impressed with how promptly the maintenance team and managers responded. They quickly provided us with a cable to power essential appliances like the fridge and phone chargers, and an electrician arrived first thing the next morning to resolve the issue. Despite the hiccup, the level of service and support we received was excellent. Overall, a very positive experience.

Awesome place. Villa was left on arrival late check in with Heater on and perfect instructions and directions from office.  Absolutely loved this place and staff were very friendly and accommodating
Highly recommend this place.
Price was also very fair.
Cannot fault the BIG4 we are so pleased that we chose too stay here and in the future trips would not stay  anywhere else, Can not recommend the BIG4 High Enough 😀
Amazing place to stay . Close to Launceston and shops . Beautiful rooms nice and comfy beds
Would not recommend this place very poor hospitality from reception staff, open kitchen close to bathroom very unpleasant experience.
Perfect Little stay for what I needed. And the hand written note welcoming me there when I arrived so late was sweet
Not dog friendly
Nice staff, great area's to park with alot of room between neighbours
The park was good ,plenty of room on site,amenities were well kept and clean.At $55 per night payable before arrival it is over priced.

Great location, modern and new facilities.
Laundry facilities in excellent condition.
Early check in free of charge . Kids loved jumping pillow.
Beds where very comfy

We are in a caravan.  The sites are ok.

The noise from the highway from about 6am Mon to Fri with trucks coming into town and riding their exhaust brakes down the hill can work like a wake up call.

Close to the city !!
Counter staff are exceptional and very accommodating !!
Ammenities are first Class
Highly recommended

We recently stayed three nights in one of the studio cabins. Ours was very nice, modern, clean and well equipped. We weren’t aware it was a studio so a little smaller than we were used to.
The location is adjacent to a major road so is noisy on the balcony but not in the cabin.
The service is excellent and everything was prepared when we arrived .
Very clean amenities and polite and helpful staff
It was quite nice and enjoyable stay very modern and spacious.highly recommend and good value for money

The amenities were spotless, we didn’t see the rooms as we pitched a tent but they looked amazing from the outside and the grounds were well kept.
We had a large camp site with wallabies visiting each night.
I really enjoyed the stay there and will be returning next time I visit Tasmania.

Stayed in one of the luxury condos and it was absolutely fantastic.
Incredibly clean, nice and modern.
Staff were lovely and made us feel welcome.
Honestly could not fault our stay.
If I could give more than 5 stars I would!

Found a toenail and an eyelash from the previous guest, but aside from that, everything was great. Excellent customer service at reception. The location is fantastic. We stayed in both the Hilltop Villa and the Luxury Condo—both had amazing city views.

This place was absolutely amazing! The staff and check in was easy and excellent. I’ve stayed at a lot of places for work, and this one by far is the best! 10/10. Can’t wait to come back on a personal trip
The accommodation was fantastic great location.  Staff so helpful. Would stay here again

I recently stayed in one of the cabins at BIG4 Launceston Holiday Park for a 3-night work trip and was thoroughly impressed. On the day of arrival, I received a thoughtful SMS letting me know I could check in early if I wished.

The hospitality was outstanding. I arrived around 5PM, and the lady who checked me in was incredibly friendly and welcoming. As a precaution in case I arrived after hours, the team had already placed the key in my cabin and thoughtfully turned on the lights and heater. Walking into a warm, well-lit cabin after a long day was such a comfort. Highly recommend!
Very clean and stylish plenty of room, fantastic service will be back forsure

Pre booked  3 night stay, powered site, 2 adults. Busy park, easy to find from the highway but also noisy because of its proximity, day and night.
Park is on a hillside with level terraced sites set in between rows of cabins/villas.
Amenities have been refurbished at some point with the showers having a tiny dressing side with a seat and three hooks for your belongings. Plenty of hot water but shower curtains are hung high allowing water all through the cubicle. Row of toilets and basins.
Close to town , shopping and attractions.

The spot lights on the new units at the top should be set on timer eg 12.00 at night to go off so as not shine on bedrooms of the lower units.
Otherwise great stay will come again.

Loved our stay in the Luxury condo. It was like being in a 5 star hotel but with all the facilities, play area and space of a caravan park. We loved spotting wildlife from the balcony at night. Sensational views, everything you need to self cater, exceptionally clean and so comfortable. Could easily fit 2 families.
Close to Launceston CBD and Cataract Gorge and ample car parking.
Staff were friendly and so helpful, messaged us to say our condo was available for early check in. Thanks for the easter activities for the kids too. Cant wait to come back and see the pool and playground updates.
Great location in Launceston. Amenities were clean and great little laundry. We had a powered site with a bit of a view. The staff member at the front desk was extremely friendly and helpful.

First time staying at the BIG4, and it didn’t disappoint.
The rooms were clean and as expected from the photos online - we got a message on the day that we could check in early which was great too. It was a nice quiet spot for us to relax for the long weekend & we enjoyed the stay. Staff were lovely and friendly, kids enjoyed the play area too.

Extremely convenient location and very modern rooms. We were only staying here for one night at the end of our holiday, but wish we were here longer to enjoy the facilities. Very friendly and helpful reception with a great little gift shop.
Very nice camper ground with very nice staff.

Stayed for a night on our trip through Tassie. Villas are clean, spacious and well appointed with very helpful reception staff. It's a small walk into the CBD but easy to navigate in and out of the park.
Wonderful cabins, well located

Our 5th Big 4 site in Tassie, it has to be ranked among the top. Space is well utilized and we stayed 2 nights on a concrete slab powered site. Standard amenities and clean. I feel very at home here. Location is right to Midlands Highway which makes it very accessible.
We had a powered site for our rental van and found the park very shady, clean and quiet at night. The amenities were very clean and the had a lovely hot shower. 👍
Clean room, friendly staff.
Spent 5 nights here ,wonderful staff,beautiful emenities
The cabin that the family stayed in was very clean, neat and tidy. Staff at reception were very helpful. Would recommend.

Easy access from highway without needing to go through city.
Quick easy pleasant check in.
Clean facilities.
Great laundry.
Close access to tourist destination.

Watch out for the pademelon poop! Really great bar the fact that the wifi was pretty much non existent. I was up the back in a powered site with campervan and the WiFi was down the front. Which meant no WiFi. Easy to connect to but dropped out after 2 seconds. Facilities were clean, water was hot. Kitchen is at the bottom of a very steep rise, so hopefully try to get a site 40- 48, then you'll have connectivity. The bathrooms are up top tho. Not a great layout. The lady in reception was awesome though, gave me some hints and tips. And they have a small provedore in reception.

Looking at some of the 5 star reviews we must of been staying at a different camp site! The views were of a very busy major Road & industrial sites. We were packed in like a tin of sardines on all sides. There is nothing in walking distance.We booked for 2 nights & stayed for 1, which says it all. The showers were ok

If you like a quiet place to sleep this is not the place. They say location is great as it is close to town but you are  right near a freeway with constant  truck noise and air brakes. Also you are in the flight path of planes. I wouldn’t stay here again.
I camped there and found the amenities to be very clean and well kept. The showers were great...plenty of hot water. The staff are friendly and personable.

Friendly staff and nice facilities.
Stopped over for 1 night to use one of their powered sites with our rented motor home and as a bonus the local pademelon population kept the kids entertained during the evening which was great as we did not expect to see any wildlife so close to the city.
A great place to stay. Helpful staff  and great cabins. Fantastic views of Launceston. Within easy reach of highway too. Close to Cataract Gorge.

The amenities are clean. Laundry is clean and charges are reasonable. However the existing camp kitchen is not user friendly and too difficult to access. There is a dump master about 500 metres from site 76.
Nice park and facilities. Great location if you need close access to Launceston.

Location is great, really close to Launceston.
Amenities are nice and clean (and new) but the kitchen was not.
We know it's under construction but it's very overprice for what if offers.

Great little park, fantastic location to all of Launceston activities. Staff were extremely helpful friendly.
It’s priced well and the facilities were the cleanest I’ve seen. Cute little rabbits scampering around the place is lovely to watch,
Road works are happening out the front , but it was no bother, the entrance is well sign posted to get in and out.  Any issues you can call staff if you need any assistance, they are happy to assist. We will be back. 🙂

We stayed 10 nights in a powered site and found it central to travel out to surrounding districts. Sites are varied in size and may have slab or gravel and grass but large vans catered for. Facilities are well maintained and clean. Lovely staff in the office and a lovely gift shop on site. There are renovations underway with new camp kitchen to come. Current camp kitchen very basic but there are some new bbqs available. The pademelons are plentiful at night. Only downside is the traffic noise from the highway and often planes heading or leaving the airport during the night. Didn’t impact our stay but thought I should mention.
Clean bathroom and clean site, easy access on after hours, thank tou

Great location. Views are amazing. The park is beautiful and clean and staff are super friendly as are all the Tasmanian people.
We checked in after hours and our envelope with all necessary details were waiting for us on the door. We followed them easily as the park is alive with lights.
Jo at reception was fantastic and the facilities clean and modern but the truck noise at night was a big much.

We stayed at big 4 Aireys Inlet and the pet friendly accommodation was excellent. The staff we friendly and went well beyond expectations to make the stay the best they could we would stay again highly recommended

We had a relaxing break at this park, with very friendly staff adding to the experience.
Close to beautiful beaches , easy walk to small group of shops and lots to see.
We were in our caravan and will definitely stay there again.
Good spot but too expensive for what it offers.

Great place to explore Launceston and surroundings
Very friendly welcome and extra effort to make sure we got the best and most suitable site.
Amenities were spotless and probably the best showers we’ve ever used
Despite being close to highway we didn’t notice any noise

Stayed on an RV site tucked away in the back corner with difficult access and gravel was sloping.
No bins near site.
A bit isolated with no nearby eateries.
Clean amenities. Friendly staff
Peaceful campground and great facilities. 5min drive from the beach. Would highly recommend.

Staff are amazing, either by phone or in person. I booked a cabin then asked and paid for an upgrade. Upon arrival was informed that there had been a change. Was upgraded via management to the top cabin. WOW. Brand new, amazing view and just fantastic. Many thanks for the experience. We will be back.
We had a caravan site and we have a 10 metre van and the site fitted our van and car without a problem.  Would certainly come back.
Was a great stop, nice new cabin, lovely staff who took the time to provide brochures to assist our stay.
Our first experience with ourn12m motorhome.  The location and facilities were excellent.  Julie was very welcoming and helpful.  Easy walk into Launceston city.
Great place clean and tidy
Close to Launceston stayed at a powered site

Expensive for what you get.
Extremely poor caravan parking.
Location, next to noisy motorway and under flight path. Park is located in semi commercial region of the city.
Probably better for cabin rentals than for caravans.
Amenities are ok.
Would I recommend:- probably not.

Upon arrival I was impressed with your office. I realise you are renovating which can take some time, unfortunately the standard of the camp kitchen was unusable no walls exposed to the wind.
The amenities had been renovated but shower cubicles are too narrow, the ceiling was full of mould and cobwebs. I do hope when your renovations are complete it will have the same standard we have experienced at all the other big 4 parks we have been too.
The only place close to city but very noisy as the highway is next door !
Super friendly and helpful staff. So easy to get to from the airport and about 30 minute walk to town
Great place just noise from expressway needs a buffer
Great location. However noisy as close to highway. Shower cubicle small and amenities could do with regular refreshing touch during the day. As expected from a Big 4.

We couldn’t fault our recent stay in the 3 bedroom luxury condo. Super clean and modern. Fantastic customer service from all staff however the location, with a busy road nearby, made it a bit difficult to sleep at night.

Fantastic rooms and friendly staff. Unfortunately we didn't realise until bed time that there weren't enough bed sheets and duvets to go around so the family had to share one of the three beds that did. I did call the after hours team but they didn't return my call until 9pm when the kids were asleep in the shared beds. The WiFi is slow and often drops out.

Adjacent to highway so some noise.
Jumping pillow which is fun.
Good sized camping sites. Clean amenities.

I feel like for what we payed we didn’t get much out of this park though they offer more to come in the future it’s not what they’re charging you for yet.
Reception ladies were absolutely lovely however and stopped at nothing to help us out.
Had a powered site fantastic amenities kids play area was safe staff were fantastic will come back again ☺️

Service at reception were exceptional. We stayed in on site powered site, so can’t comment on rooms. Bathrooms were modern and nice.
It was a bit noisy close to main highway.
We stayed at a powered site with a motorhome and the place is nice with all the facilities you need. Friendly and helpful service as well.
Great location and pretty nice accomodation + facilities. The staff lady who helped us, Jo, was such an angel and really kind.
We made several changes to our booking which were accepted without fuss.  Park is in stages of redevelopment but is very tidy, clean and very well managed.  Outstanding customer service
We stayed with our camper van. Facilities are good, campsite is clean. We arrived late but the reception had very helpfully left a note with the available sites. Would recommend staying here.
We were impressed by the cabins.They were very clean and modern.The bed was very comfortable. The location was good as very close to shops. The staff were very friendly and helpful.
Great park. Along side freeway very accessible. Well appointed cabin. Clean grounds and no issues parking. Laundry was clean with a sharing/ donation table. We were a large group.

Easy to find and conveniently close to the centre. The reception staff were super helpful, friendly and supportive. Caravan sites were large.
Bathroom/ shower facilities were very clean. Showers were good. Kitchen facilities are to be replaced shortly and this is needed.
Close to the motorway which we were concerned about but it wasn’t really too bad. Would be happy to return.
Staff very friendly and helpful. Cabin was clean and tidy fantastic experience

Convenient location just off the highway. We had a powered campervan site. Camp facilities were a little old but functional. Toilets were clean with good hot water. Camp kitchen was outdoors, small and not well equipped. BBQ area was new. Reception area was new and the gift shop was a nice touch. Wallabies within the park at night.

Is big 4 launceston the most expensive camp-site in Australia? At over $65 a night for a powered site (no unpowered) I suspect it may be. Outdoor kitchen dreadful, dead grass and only one bin for entire camping area. Peace and quite for sleeping, no. When the planes stop the logging trucks air brakes start rolling down the hill on the highway next door.  I can only surmise that the park is changing to cabins. We have stayed in big 4 many times around Australia and this is the worst camping experience in years and at a ridiculous price.
Is very clean and well set up. A bit close to the highway but not really a problem. Various sized sites for different sizes of camper vans. Friendly staff.

We booked a cabin for my sister in law, who was visiting from Perth, WA and a powered site to park our caravan on for ourselves.
The cabin was perfect, clean and convenient, having everything my sister in law needed, including a fantastic shower apparently.
The powered site was large enough for our van (22’), with room to spare! Great location & super friendly staff at reception. Caravan park had everything we needed and was very conveniently located.
We highly recommend staying here whilst visiting Launceston. Thank you.

We had a very pleasant stay.
The staff were friendly and courteous.
The amenities were serviceable, and we look forward to seeing what is in store for the future upgrades of this park.
Thank you.
Great facilities and service. Thanks team!

The central location is good for accessing the various tourist spots. City Park, National Motor Musuem, Cataract Gorge and Tasmania Zoo. Proximity to major highway did result in road noise in the weekend evening. Staff were courteous and helpful.
A long way to walk to kitchen facilities, would be better in the middle of park. I know that their are doing renovations
Nice park..near the hwy but couldn't hear the road once we were in the park..very friendly and accommodating staff..good location..

Friendly helpful reception staff, location is central and convenient for Cataract gorge and Launceston, but be mindful that the site is next to a major road and can be noisy. Pitch sizes are good and well spread out, toilets and showers clean and recently updated. Kitchen facilities were very disappointing and barely usable.

It was a beautiful stay at the Big4 in Launceston, close to everything.
A very relaxing time also.
Very helpful and Friendly staff great location and interesting interaction with all the local animals

When travelling Tasmania via motor home. I highly recommend Big4 holiday parks over all others. Kind and friendly staff. Highly recommend it. Great facilities. Powered sites, kitchen BBQ facilities and more.
Very clean units and all round lovely place to stay 😀

Lovely stay here. We booked the powered site and it was ideal. The receptionist was so friendly and helpful with information on what to see and where to eat!

Facilities were excellent. Very clean and close by. Definitely recommend staying here!

Though our stay was brief, our group of 55 from Canberra High School thoroughly enjoyed every moment. The spacious cabins exceeded our expectations, and the park's cleanliness and excellent facilities made our experience truly memorable. We can't wait to return!
Could not fault it. Highly recommend staying here. Perfect in every way. Thank you 😊

Location is great in terms of how close it is to popular sites and service you may need, however the highway noise can be a bit loud at peak times.

Laundry/showers/toilets all very clean and great. Camp kitchen left a lot to be desired.... Much needed upgrade is advertised as coming soon, oven did not work (we put something in for half hour at 190° only to realise it doesn't heat at all).

Service brings it up to four stars as the customer service was amazing and we were well looked after upon booking.
Cabins are wonderful,  very clean tidy spacious, friendly wallabies,

Great location, close to everything you need.
We were welcomed by the lovely Jo in reception. So friendly & informative when we were needing advice about the local area.
Even gave me a little treat for my birthday!!
Amenities & laundry area spotless.
Can’t comment on the cabins as we were travelling in a motorhome but they look very lovely & modern.

We were traveling in a campervan and had no planned stops, just going with the wind and hoping to get lucky with places to stay. It was after 6pm and a lot of places were closed around Launceston, and we thought we might have to park on a side road for the night or something but we noticed the BIG4 and drove in... everything was shut but we checked the sign on the door and was relieved to see helpful information for people like us. We chose one of the allocated spots, with power and wifi and settled in for the night. A short 10 min walk away from Hungry Jacks. Nice clean facilities, dump station etc. The main road passes close by which may be a problem for light sleepers. Squared up in the morning, friendly staff and took off.
Nice but but over the top expensive

Located close to Launceston Airport, BIG4 Discovery Parks Launceston is a great spot for families. You get a lot of road noise though.

The staff is friendly and welcoming, and the park offers amenities like BBQ pits, trampolines, a playground, and a laundry area. Although we couldn't get an ensuite and had to use the common shower and toilet facilities, everything was clean and well-maintained. A comfortable and enjoyable stay overall!
Fantastic park in good location. Will be back!
Stayed 4 nights on a powered site. Great site, clean amenities, helpful and friendly staff. A good place to camp close to Launceston.

Had a powered site for two nights in the middle of winter. This Park is ideally located for sightseeing in and around Launceston and as a starting point for exploring Tasmania. Facilities are as you expect from a Big Four Park and the level of service was excellent. Recommend.
We stayed in the big four in Launceston and the grounds were well-maintained. The service was fantastic and the showers were super clean. Whenever we head back to Launceston we will stay there again.
Warm and Friendly Staff, Loved our stay.
Bit expensive well was the dearest park we had stayed at amenities are good but cleaned at wrong times everytime l went to use in morn they were closed for cleaning
We are returning customers, clean,tidy,helpful and great location. Will always stay here when in Launceston
We stayed here year's ago and liked it, we decided to have a ride through on our bikes recently to see the new cabins and all the other improvements. Impressive!

We had a caravan there for 2 weeks.  Beautiful clean park the laundry was great with line out the back. Toilets showers very clean. Staff at the park were very very helpful to us. Overall everything was so great. Would recommend staying there for your next trip. Close by for the shops.

We stayed here for 2 Nights in a cabin to end our wonderful Tasmanian holiday.
The ladies at the reception were so friendly and helpful and showed us many places we could go to make the most of our last couple days.

The cabin was comfortable and lovely and clean and had everything we needed to be comfortable for our stay.
The laundry building was great to get all our washing and drying done after traveling for days.

Our 13 yr old son enjoyed the jumping pillow and play equipment and we were also able to purchase some gifts to take home from the beautiful gift shop in reception.

On our last morning we asked for a late check out as I wasn’t feeling well and were happily given that which was such a help while we waited for our flights.
Thankyou Big4 Launceston! We would love to come back again one day!!

This is the best service I have seen in accommodation, they have gone above and beyond for us when my mother in laws house flooded and she needed emergency accommodation for an unknown amount of time. Highly recommended this place!

We stayed for 2 nights in a powered site Then we were able to park our van in a spare area for three days while we flew to Flinders Island which was so convenient Jan at the office is a beautiful friendly lady Loved dealing with her.My issues with the park is 1.the noise from the fwy is terrible it just doesn’t stop but that’s not the parks fault 2.Terrible position of the camp kitchen It’s right down the bottomof the hill and when all the powered site are at the top just a pain I would add another camp kitchen into your soon to be additions you are saying your doing
The bathrooms up the top are well maintained compared to the ones at the camp kitchen
The park is central to everything

Overpriced powered camping site. 78 AUD for one night. In whole Tasmania we didn't pay that much for one night. Service: not picking up the phone even if no customer is in. Not calling back either. Very noisy location since it is next to the highway. If your in Tasmania for nature and wildlife skip Launceston.

We stayed in the luxury condos.   They were absolutely amazing!!
Right on the side of a hill with the best views of Launceston.  Staff were fantastic and it is in a great location right near the city.
Highly recommended!!!!!

Travelled across from victoria for speedway and spent 3 weeks here, lovely staff, clean rooms and very accomodating.
Staff went above and beyond to ensure we had a comfortable stay ⭐️ We would definitely stay here again!

Stayed here for a couple of days on a powered site. Close to the city, Cataracts Gorge and Trevallyn Reserve. Modern clean amenities, friendly staff. A bit of road noise during the day but not at night.

We had a wonderful experience staying with BIG4 Launceston Holiday Park again this week. We have stayed here as a family before, in their City Villas and have always found them to be spacious and clean. This time around it was a last minute booking but they made the whole process so simple and hassle free. The Villas are modern and provide everything a family could want or need. Great place for children, our daughter had a fantastic time playing on the playground and on the huge jumping cushion. She loved feeding the local pademelons that appeared around our Villa at sunset. We will definitely be staying here again.
Large cabin,clean,nice L shaped couch,lovely office ladies
Very friendly staff, excellent modern and clean facilities and close to town.  Would definitely stay there again.
Reception was extremely helpful. The park was close to town.

Friendly  staff
Good BBQ area
Nice showers and toilets
Good place to do some laundry
Highly recommended, great spot, everything you will need, great office staff

340 dollars for a night in a cabin because it's a holiday weekend outrageously expensive.
Got a room at the country club for half that amount and I dont have to walk into town  for dinner.
Very disappointing.

We had the pleasure of staying in two cabins (no 14 and 18) which were spectacular!  The Cabins have all the modern amenities and are beautifully appointed.  The views were also a treat and can be enjoyed on the ample outdoor decks. You want for nothing if you book here.  Jo and her office team were great to deal with and were very accommodating, as we booked at late notice and then asked to stay longer.  We has a 5 star visit!

Beautiful Park in South Launceston on the side of a hill, which is a reserve full of wildlife, some of whom visit the campground.  Very friendly staff, modern amenities.  Not many grassed campsites but we got one.  Near shops & main roads but the Park is quiet.  Recommended.
Enjoyed our stay ,but I think you could do better by putting concrete pads were the gravel and dust was at sites 1 tier down from toilets ,  cheers Bill and Deb
Everything nice enough and clean just the road noise is crazy.
Nice clean amenities. Small camping spots and unbearable road nose.

Great location so close to Launceston! I stayed on a powered site overnight as was just passing through. Site 9b is pretty high up and you get a great view. Lots of space… you don’t feel like you’re all on top of each other. Good and clean amenities. Free shower that had no time limit! Easy transaction… I called just before closing time and Sheridan was lovely on the phone. When I arrived, there was an envelope with my name on it and a smiley face 😊

Located near the highway, ok.
Service is not acceptable. Laundry and dryer only work with coins. Without cash, the reception wasn't able/willing to return coins when paying with credit cards. In the end, we had to walk to a nearby fuel station (10 minutes each) to get coins. When arriving at the Big4, the only dryer was in use, and the other out-of-order (only 2 for that size!). We cannot recommend this campground.

One of the best stays ever! The staff was amazing. Friendly and so helpful. Our cabin was incredible (and we could access it early as it was ready for us). Spotless, spacious, welcoming. We had absolutely everything we needed for our family. We felt a world away yet connected to everything. The bouncy pillow a hit. We will come back FOR SURE! Thank you team for a truly memorable stay.
Great location and easily the nicest apartments we stayed in in Tasmania - heaps of space and well maintained- definitely recommend ☺️👍

I needed a spot for my one person tent. I ended up paying the same price as the other large caravans (65$), even though I didn't need power and electricity. The camp kitchen was barely equipped, no detergent, basically no dishes. Laundry room and bathrooms were okay. The place is also quite noisy due to the highway close by.
The highlights were all the animals at night.
I left kinda grumpy mainly due to the missing price flexibility. I really liked Launceston though!

Stayed two nights. (26th to 28th January, 2024)

No powered campsite:
1 person 1 small tent costed 40$ per night.

Kitchen: 6/10
Toilet: 8/10
Location: 6/10
Value for money: 1/10
Noise: 3/10 (beside highway resulting huge noise from vehicle.)
Very expensive for a person in a tiny tent with minimal level grassy sites. Very basic camp kitchen and facilities for a premium price. Park is suited to cabins. A lot of traffic noise.
They were so considerate and sensible and booked our powered site right across the amenities I really appreciated that as a mum and son camper

Great location close to the city with easy access to the motorway out of town. Check in staff very friendly and gave great tips on how to spend our time in Launceston. Amenities were nice and clean. Potaroos plentiful at night.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the Launceston Big 4! We booked a caravan slab site for 4 nights! The ladies at reception were
So helpful and friendly! A treasure hunt kept the kids busy! The park has great, clean facilities and is in a great location for exploring! One of the best parks we visited on our 4 weeks van trip! Thanks
Loved the cabins. Clean and bright and spacious.
We stayed on a powered site. This campsite has excellent and well maintained facilities, friendly staff and a great location. We were extremely impressed.

Absolutely loved this place!
All brand new and the best views if staying in the hilltop cabin.
Very clean and spacious.

Clean, well laid out. Beautifully maintained . Lovely staff. Good location- close to everything. Little bit of noise from highway. The grandkids loved playing with other kids on the bouncy pillow and feeding the horses next door
Great view of the fireworks and the city for New Years from the balcony
Easy access. Nice playground for kids. Very clean facilities. Friendly staff.

Very nice location, small cabin but have everything you need.
Staff are very friendly and always ready to help.
Lot of space for kids to jump and play around.
Can't ask for anything more.!!!
No rubbish bins, sites uneven which can be a problem, I think renovationg is under way. We found the bays abit short. No camp kitchen but once again  in stage of renovating  so who knows

Camped in a swag in one of the standard powered sites. Very well maintained, lots of cute potaroos (pooparoos according to my partner; they do poop a lot lol). Laundry and bathrooms are great. The water taps at the camp sites are a bit funny and spray in every direction. Great place to stay. It is right next to the freeway though, so there is a fair bit of road noise. Wasnt too bad overnight but might be a concern for particularly sensitive sleepers when the occasional vehicle goes by. Best thing about the site is that it's nearby everything. There's shops, rock climbing, the city, everything within 10 minutes drive.

My family and I stayed in a motorhome within the park. The staff were incredibly kind, helpful and inviting. From the moment we checked in, we felt so welcomed. Really helped us to take a nice breath and unwind after a big day travelling the coast. The amenities were all clean, modern and warm. Very easy to navigate laundry and park facilities. It was nice to have a bit of space between each site too. We didn’t feel like sardines in a can, but had room to move about without feeling like we would invade other people’s privacy.
We definitely will be recommending to others!
Great caravan park, good facilities (hot water & pressure), close to Launceston CBD, minimal noise from HWY…10/19
Extremely helpful, friendly and accommodating staff. Very clean facilities. Easy walk into CBD.
Pretty close to everything a short drive out of Launceston

We love staying at the Big 4. It's such a great location and the jumping pillow is always a winner with the kids. We normally stay in the cabins which are always clean and modern, but this time we camped. We were close to the amenities when was great with the kids. They were clean and spacious. We did use the fridge at the camp kitchen. The camp kitchen is dated but I believe they have plans to revamp this which we are excited to see. The staff are always friendly and the reception area has a little providore which is a great addition.

It's been a perfect place to unwind and reminisce at the end of the day after exploring beautiful northern tasmania with the adventure all stars team.

The rooms were clean and comfortable.

... and the couch very inviting.
Great location, clean rooms, staying as a part of Adventure All Stars team, perfect!

Great spacious rooms , great location!
Currently staying here as cast members for Adventure All Stars , thank you Big4 for hosting us 🩷
What an incredible accomodation! The Adventure All Stars group love this place!!! We can’t wait to film the best of the best in Launceston!
The cabins are clean and spacious and the workers are really lovely and welcoming. I stayed here while filming with The Adventure All Stars

We stayed here as part of our Adventure All Stars Tasmania trip. The staff were so friendly & welcoming, and the park was in such a great location.
Thank you Big4 Launceston!

Great clean and spacious cabins.
Staying as part of the Cast for Adventure All Stars!
As part of adventure all star we loved this accommodation. It was a great location, friendly staff and a great place to lay your head after a busy day.
Stayed here while we were filming Adventure All Stars, the perfect base for exploring northern Tassie! Lovely staff, clean and comfortable.
Amazing place and incredible staff! Thank you for a fantastic stay and hosting us for Adventure All Stars :)

Great little spot. Stayed for 2 nights on a powered site, we had a hired motor home without chocks  and were having issues getting level so the team were happy to shuffle us to a different spot to help out.

Amenities are simple but great, showers free, plenty of washing machines and a clothes line big enough for everyone out the back.

There's construction work going on at the moment up the top of the pack and they've got big plans to improve the park in the near future! Easy to get in and out of and a short 5 minute drive into town
It's an excellent camping ground. It has a good toilet and shower and laundry facilities. There’s a size kids' playground and animals to see, such as horses, sheep, bandicoot, and pademelon.
Great park, very friendly service and they were great with the kids. Even let us had a late check out.

Booked a powered site and was happy with the prompt and professional service received! I recommend to anyone that travels around the area. Great place to book for a short or a long stay. Thank you for your professionalism, Big4 Launceston!
We had a powered caravan site, and the park was very conveniently near my activities.

Only stayed over night in an on-site cabin which was surprisingly but very pleasingly upgraded to a brand new city view cabin on arrival. Receptionist/Manager was  very friendly at the same time professional. Highly recommend this Park and will most certainly return but with our caravan this time which I also noticed the sites are of good size and easy access.
the location is nice and there is a playground so pretty cool I lived in the motor home so I didn't take the room so idk

Great little caravan park. We stayed in a cabin. Prices are a bit expensive at Big 4s in general but you do get what you pay for. As we like to eat in. It was fantastic they had everything you need to cook. Launceston is cold but the heating in the unit was great. The place was safe and there was safe parking. This is important if you have a rented car. The room was spotless clean as was the  shower.But the high quality amenities actually made everything else cheaper to stay in Launceston. It is also convenient to the airport. I would stay agin as on average this is a very good place to stay.
